creator: dbader@eece.unm.edu
text:
The following tarball should completely replace the
	/usr/ports/net/mpich directory. It upgrades the mpich package
	from version 1.1.2 to version 1.2.0

Fix: 

--
David A. Bader, Ph.D.                           Office: 505-277-6724
Dept of Electrical and Computer Engineering     FAX:    505-277-1439
EECE Building                                                       
University of New Mexico                         dbader@eece.unm.edu
Albuquerque, NM  87131               http://www.eece.unm.edu/~dbader--INEfvVsjuKNStgQkaqrj7P5aPgnEtXFADuDCcIWstHRzsVCt
Content-Type: text/plain; name="mpich-1.2.0.tgz"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="mpich-1.2.0.tgz"
